title: James Van Der Beek Honored by Elle Series Following Final Role

captions.instagram:
Prime Video's new series *Elle* pays a moving tribute to the late James Van Der Beek, featuring his final on-screen performance. Learn more about the dedication and his impactful role.

pinterest.title: James Van Der Beek Receives Heartfelt Tribute in Elle Series
pinterest.description: Prime Video's new series *Elle* honors the late James Van Der Beek with a special title card following his final powerful performance as Dean Wilson. Discover the details of this poignant dedication.
